posts.text:
A reminder: the school shooter in Uvalde was taken down by hero Border Patrol (BORTAC) agents. Democrats have defunded DHS.

Video

Again I want to thank TSA agents for showing up to work even though democrats would rather throw a tantrum in the name of illegal aliens than pay you the checks you’ve earned. 

I hope President Trump issues a bonus for your efforts and your service.

Did miss where he called for freedom and human rights for the Iranian people? Or is this just another virtue signal against Jews?

Video
Tomi Lahren: Democrats are not for the 'every day' man or woman anymore | Fox News Video foxnews.com/video/6390993665…

I don’t think it’s the Islamophobia that’s killing us…


Governor Kathy Hochul (@GovKathyHochul)

On this International Day to Combat Islamophobia, and at a time when fear and division are rising in many places, New York stands firm: 

Hate has no home here.

Muslim New Yorkers strengthen our communities every day, and we will always stand together against Islamophobia.



— https://nitter.net/GovKathyHochul/status/2033229472070050001#m

TSA agents: Democrats will consider giving you a paycheck so long as Republicans promise not to enforce immigration law or deport their constituents (illegal aliens). 

How does that feel?

More tonight on @BigWeekendShow 5-8pmET foxnews

Democrats cover for illegal aliens and terrorists because a mail in vote is a mail in vote. 

The so-called “News Media” covers for illegal aliens and terrorists because they have to whitewash these monsters to keep oblivious readers and watchers from questioning support for Democrats.

And on and on the cycle goes. 

Thank goodness for X, independent journalists, and FoxNews.

Democrats want every illegal alien, every terrorist, every rapist, every fraudster to stay in this country and worse, out on the streets.

Video

I’d assume Mamdani’s wife illustrates for them as well?

Video

It’s time for @BigWeekendShow 

Coming up ⬇️

* @marcuslemonis 

* @JohnFetterman
What should we ask @JohnFetterman tonight on @BigWeekendShow ?

Democrats allow millions of illegal invaders into your country, many of whom are dangerous, some of whom are terrorists.

And now they have defunded DHS in their DEMAND we have less immigration enforcement, apprehension and deportation. 

They opened the door for us to be slaughtered, now they wanna make sure it stays open and are fine with TSA workers and others going without pay just to hammer home that message. 

If you’re still voting for Democrats, you might wanna pull your head out of your
Do you all really think Zoron the Moron is destroying New York by accident? Do you really think this isn’t by design? Come on now.

To those weak-stomached Americans who got squirmish on “mass deportations” because the white leftist banshees got in your head, remember this, the Democrats don’t consider ANY illegal to be “worst of the worst.”

We’ve got naturalized immigrants + illegals in this country who are KNOWN terrorists and the leftist activist judges are like, nah give em another chance. 

This should piss you the hell off. 

Not only do we need MASS deportations, we need MASS de-naturalizations. 

Get them OUT.
Tomi Lahren Live Stream
